events.name: Healing-Item Shortage
events.desc: Adventurers cleaned out every potion shelf in three worlds.

events.name: Weapon Boom
events.desc: A rumor of monsters has everyone buying steel.

events.name: Collector Convention
events.desc: Collectors from six universes are in town with full wallets.

events.name: Mushroom Oversupply
events.desc: The Mushroom Kingdom had a bumper crop. Again.

events.name: Materia Shortage
events.desc: Mako refinement is down for maintenance.

events.name: Ninja-Tool Demand
events.desc: The Chunin Exams are apparently next week.

events.name: Capsule Technology Craze
events.desc: Everything must fit in a pocket now. It's the law of fashion.

events.name: Evolution-Stone Rush
events.desc: Every trainer suddenly needs a stone. No one knows why today.

events.name: Shard Glut
events.desc: Heartless are dropping shards like confetti this week.

events.name: Explosives Inspection
events.desc: A safety inspector is visiting. Bomb prices dip discreetly.

events.name: Sweet Tooth Epidemic
events.desc: An entire kingdom simultaneously craves dessert.

events.name: Bottle Deposit Scheme
events.desc: Bottled goods gain value. Hyrule takes recycling seriously.

events.name: Quiet Day
events.desc: The bridge hums softly. Prices hold steady.
